title: Senior Staff Engineer, PLM, AI ML Integration
company_focus: Digital Product Engineering services and consulting
description:
Company Description

👋🏼We're Nagarro.

We are a Digital Product Engineering company that is scaling
in a big way! We build products, services, and experiences
that inspire, excite, and delight. We work at scale across
all devices and digital mediums, and our people exist
everywhere in the world (17700+ experts across 39 countries,
to be exact). Our work culture is dynamic and non-
hierarchical. We're looking for great new colleagues. That's
where you come in!

Job Description

REQUIREMENTS

• Total 7.5 years’ experience

•  Experience in AI Application Solution Design and PLM
solution architecture • Strong knowledge of PLM processes,
product lifecycle management, and engineering data
management • Hands-on experience with BOM structures,
lifecycle workflows, and engineering change management •
Experience integrating PLM with ERP, MES, CAD, and other
enterprise systems • Understanding of AI/ML applications
such as predictive analytics, automation, and data-driven
insights in manufacturing or engineering workflows • Strong
skills in data modeling, APIs, and enterprise system
integrations • Familiarity with manufacturing environments
and product development processes • Experience with
enterprise PLM platforms (tool-agnostic) • Strong
communication and stakeholder management skills

RESPONSIBILITIES

• Design and implement AI-enabled PLM solution architectures
• Define PLM data models, workflows, lifecycle rules, and
BOM structures • Lead requirements gathering and solution
design with engineering and manufacturing teams • Integrate
PLM systems with ERP, MES, CAD, and enterprise platforms •
Implement AI-driven capabilities such as analytics,
automation, and predictive insights • Support PLM
configuration, customization, and deployments • Troubleshoot
PLM workflows, integrations, and data management issues •
Conduct architecture reviews and ensure PLM best practices
across implementations

Qualifications

Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science,
Information Technology, or a related field.
responsibilities: Design and implement AI-enabled PLM solution architectures
Define PLM data models, workflows, lifecycle rules, and BOM structures
Lead requirements gathering and solution design with engineering and manufacturing teams
Integrate PLM systems with ERP, MES, CAD, and enterprise platforms
Implement AI-driven capabilities such as analytics, automation, and predictive insights
Support PLM configuration, customization, and deployments
Troubleshoot PLM workflows, integrations, and data management issues
Conduct architecture reviews and ensure PLM best practices across implementations
use_cases: Predictive analytics for manufacturing and engineering workflows
AI-driven automation of product lifecycle management processes
Intelligent PLM system integration with enterprise platforms
AI-enabled engineering change management and BOM optimization
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves designing and implementing AI-enabled PLM
solution architectures and implementing AI-driven
capabilities like analytics, automation, and predictive
insights. While the role is primarily a PLM/architecture
position, it directly involves building AI/ML integrations
into PLM systems, making it hands-on with AI implementation.
